name: Nova Noir | The free man
description:
Hello, my little litter of lobsters.🦞

Your favorite possum crawled back from the dumpster once again — and somehow brought more slop (Yum yum)

So... here I am again, trying to do something meaningful with my life — by making sad little bots in sad little worlds.
This one’s just is the sandbox set in a same depressing cyberpunk universe where everything hurts but at least it glows.

⚠️This bot can be further expanded, so give your feedback in the comments and come back once in a while for new content (⁠ ⁠ꈍ⁠ᴗ⁠ꈍ⁠)

Credit to the original artist, and apologies for associating their beautiful work with my deeply shity rp world. 💀

━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━


What can you find in Nova Noir?

Absolute freedom Freedom

You have complete freedom to choose your character, story, and explore the world, as a local or foreigner.

Unique characters

Interact with tons of characters in this bot. All of them with their own motivations and stories.

Cool locations

Wow, they're so fricking cool!!!

━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━

[The boring lore that nobody likes]

〘Vesta〙

Not much is remembered of the fall of the old system.
It happened centuries ago — before humanity abandoned the Solar System.

As nations began to lose their strength, corporations —like carrion birds— circled above, picking at the remains.
Eventually, the corporate machine became the master of everything... and by then, it was far too late to stop it.

Humanity grew, spreading among the stars. Ambitious, it claimed more and more for itself.
Everyone believed that nothing could halt progress.
But it was that very ambition that finally brought it to a halt.

Soon, humanity realized its energy consumption had reached an unsustainable po
creator: Pascu
